name: Ontology - remove stale _ont_status left by de-scoped mappings

statements.__comment: SpaceliftStack._ont_status carried a run-phase value (StackState) that is not the active/disabled lifecycle the CICDPipeline ontology models; its mapping was removed, so strip the stale value from previously-synced nodes.
statements.query: MATCH (n:SpaceliftStack) WHERE n._ont_status IS NOT NULL REMOVE n._ont_status

statements.__comment: AzureTenant._ont_status was populated from Entra's geographic 'state' field (an address province, not a tenant lifecycle); its mapping was removed, so strip the stale value from previously-synced nodes.
statements.query: MATCH (n:AzureTenant) WHERE n._ont_status IS NOT NULL REMOVE n._ont_status
